scripts.build: bun run build:js && bun run build:copy
scripts.build:js: bun run build:bg && bun run build:content && bun run build:popup && bun run build:options
scripts.build:bg: mkdir -p dist/background && bun build src/background/background.ts --outfile dist/background/background.js --format esm --target browser
scripts.build:content: mkdir -p dist/content && bun build src/content/content.ts --outfile dist/content/content.js --format iife --target browser
scripts.build:popup: mkdir -p dist/popup && bun build src/popup/popup.ts --outfile dist/popup/popup.js --format iife --target browser
scripts.build:options: mkdir -p dist/options && bun build src/options/options.ts --outfile dist/options/options.js --format iife --target browser
scripts.build:copy: cp src/popup/popup.html src/popup/popup.css dist/popup/ && cp src/options/options.html src/options/options.css dist/options/
scripts.watch: bun build --watch src/background/background.ts --outfile dist/background/background.js --format esm --target browser
